channel.title: Microbiome Digest
channel.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
channel.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-14
item.description: Here's a deep-dive segment based on the provided information: | The influence and mechanism of gut microbiota on spermatogenesis | Recent research has uncovered a fascinating connection between gut microbiota and male reproductive health.
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
